sections.content: Clicking on the purple target at (5, 15) changed the board! Let me check what changed by comparing the before and after frames.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Clicking purple target at (5, 15) changed the board!
# Let me see what changed

if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    
    before_nodes = {n['color']: [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == c] 
                   for c in set(n['color'] for n in before_seg['nodes'])}
    after_nodes = {n['color']: [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == c] 
                  for c in set(n['color'] for n in after_seg['nodes'])}
    
    print("Before -> After node counts:")
    for color in set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys())):
        before_count = len(before_nodes.get(color, []))
        after_count = len(after_nodes.get(color, []))
        if before_count != after_count:
            print(f"  {color}: {before_count} -> {after_count}")
    
    # Check purple targets specifically
    before_purple = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
    after_purple = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
    print(f"\nPurple targets before: {len(before_purple)}")
    print(f"Purple targets after: {len(after_purple)}")
    for p in after_purple:
        b = p['boundary']
        cr = (min(r for r,c in b) + max(r for r,c in b)) // 2
        cc = (min(c for r,c in b) + max(c for r,c in b)) // 2
        print(f"  Purple at ({cr}, {cc})")

# Current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
purple = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"\nCurrent purple targets: {len(purple)}")
for p in purple:
    b = p['boundary']
    cr = (min(r for r,c in b) + max(r for r,c in b)) // 2
    cc = (min(c for r,c in b) + max(c for r,c in b)) // 2
    print(f"  Purple at ({cr}, {cc})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
